What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A woman with blonde hair and glasses wears a pink sleeveless top while gesturing with her hands on the left side. On the right, a man with a beard holds a small fluffy grey and white cat in his arms. Another woman with blonde hair stands beside the man wearing a black top. Text overlays appear at the bottom of the screen.

canonical_answer: At 0s, the 'clevver NEWS' logo appears on a striped background; at 2s, a person in a black leather jacket stands near a green bottle; at 4s, a group walks outdoors on a paved surface; at 8s, men in suits stand on a red carpet before microphones; at 14s, a woman in a pink top speaks next to a man holding a cat.
